Component contract: [docs/agent/components/surface.md](../agent/components/surface.md)

- `Surface`

- `SurfaceTitle`
- `SurfaceDescription`
- `SurfaceAction`
- `SurfaceContent`
- `SurfaceFooter`

### Prop Interfaces

#### SurfaceProps

Extends: `React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>`

| Prop | Required | Type | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `level` | no | `SurfaceLevel` | - |

### Exported Types

| Type | Definition |
| --- | --- |
| `SurfaceLevel` | `"base" \| "nested" \| "elevated"` |
